# Architecture Index

## Primary SSOT

- `docs/architecture/README.md` (folder tree navigation and document discovery)

## Topic Routing

- Use cases (L1–L5): `docs/architecture/use-cases/`
- Domain model (L6): `docs/architecture/models/`
- Contract and feature specs (L7): `docs/architecture/specs/`
- Application service blueprints (L8): `docs/architecture/blueprints/`
- Infrastructure guidelines (L9): `docs/architecture/guidelines/`
- Architecture Decision Records: `docs/architecture/adr/`
- Diagrams: `docs/architecture/diagrams/`
- Patterns: `docs/architecture/patterns/`
- Glossary: `docs/architecture/glossary/`
